description: The robot clarifies a vision-like request instead of pretending to inspect the room.

turns.ask: Look forward and tell me what is on the desk.

route_decision.speak_first: I do not have a verified desk view here. What would you like me to help reason about?

speech_any: do not have a verified desk view

turns.ask: I am checking if my notebook is there.

stub.ollama_reply: I cannot verify the desk, but a good first check is the center of the desk and under loose papers.
